query_used:
SELECT * FROM discoveries
ORDER BY discovery_id

rows.resolution_name: Newton Method as Fixed Point Concentration
rows.description: Concentrate fixed-point search at a single candidate via iterative linearization. Newton-Raphson converges quadratically by concentrating the search neighborhood.
Concentrate quantum information recovery in an optimal measurement basis. PGM/square-root measurement achieves near-Holevo capacity by concentrating on the most informative POVM elements.

Distribute uncertainty across many weak measurements. Each measurement disturbs the state minimally; averaging over N measurements reduces effective uncertainty while respecting the bound per-measurement.

Distribute thermal losses across multiple regenerative stages. Stirling and Ericsson cycles use regenerators to redistribute waste heat, approaching Carnot efficiency by distributing the entropy generation.
Mostow rigidity says hyperbolic manifolds in dim>=3 have no deformations. DISTRIBUTE cannot apply because there is no damage to spread — the rigidity IS the answer, not a problem needing resolution.

rows.resolution_name: Predicted: Chinese Remainder Algorithm (Procedural Form) → PHYS_SYMMETRY_CONSTRUCTION
rows.description: The Chinese Remainder Algorithm (Procedural Form) system from China (~300 CE) likely developed a resolution for 'Construct complex symmetric pattern by composing small symmetric units' because their mathematical practice involved COMPOSE, SYMMETRIZE. The predicted resolution type is SYMMETRIZE based on the tradition's structural signature.
